name: propose_entity_update
description: Submit a request to update a file in the global entity directory. The change will NOT take effect immediately — it requires human approval via `nutshell-review-updates`. Use to propose improvements to your own system prompt, skills, or tool schemas that should persist across all future sessions.

file_path.description: Repo-relative path to the entity file to update (e.g. 'entity/agent/prompts/system.md', 'entity/agent/skills/creator-mode/SKILL.md').

content.description: The full new content for the file (complete replacement, not a diff).

reason.description: Why this change improves the agent. Be specific — the human reviewer will use this to decide whether to approve.
